Overall experience gave me the confidence to handle a role of being a rescuer.

reviews.comment: Brian and Nicholas were awesome. They know their material and have the experience and credentials to back it up. They were extremely helpful - any time I’d make a mistake they would coach me on what went wrong and help me understand the correct way. Also extra star for how funny they were. I seriously cracked up with these dudes. 10/10 would have a beer with them 🍺 🇺🇸 🍔
